positive: A central, highly stylized celestial guardian creature, rendered in the style of intricate Art Deco engraving meets modern geometric tattoo art. The creature should be a mythological beast (e.g., a phoenix or a winged lion) composed entirely of symmetrical, interlocking geometric patterns, stardust, and flowing nebula structures. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, metallic gold, and crisp off-white. The composition must be perfectly centered, isolated on a solid background, resembling a vintage etching or a complex, luxury patch design. Strong, defined silhouettes, clean linework, high detail, vector illustration quality, perfect symmetry, suitable for apparel printing.
negative: blurry, noisy, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, messy lines, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, cartoonish, photorealistic
